old_value: {"id":"project-LICHEN-ccoj","title":"[CODEREVIEW-1] schema.json oneOf addition for ccp15/ccp16 may miss some v2 vector variants in ccp16-desync.json which uses array root not envelope","description":"test/vectors/schema.json:22 - ccp16-desync.json starts with JSON array not object with format_version and vectors; schema validation will fail for it. format_version=2 support incomplete without conditional schema.","status":"open","priority":2,"issue_type":"bug","created_at":"2026-07-22T16:50:52.122619833Z","created_by":"ec2-user","updated_at":"2026-07-22T16:50:52.122619833Z","labels":["codereview"]}
